analysis.reasoning: The tweet foregrounds EU unity and solidarity in actions like opening talks with Western Balkan countries and continuing with frameworks; it also presents enlargement policy as forward-looking (revised methodology) and frames EU actions as contributing to regional development (economic/investment plan).
